name: Ember & Co
description: A thoughtfully curated collection of artisanal home goods, accessories, and lifestyle essentials designed for the modern home.

hero.heading: Curated goods for modern living
hero.subheading: Handcrafted, sustainable, and designed to last. Discover our latest collection of artisanal home essentials.

about.heading: Made with intention
about.body: Ember & Co was born from a simple idea: everyday objects should bring joy. We partner with independent makers and small workshops to bring you pieces that are beautiful, functional, and made to last. Every product is sourced ethically and crafted sustainably.

values.title: Sustainably Sourced
values.desc: Every material chosen with care for the planet.

values.title: Handcrafted
values.desc: Made by skilled artisans, not mass-produced.

values.title: Fair Trade
values.desc: Supporting makers with fair wages and conditions.

testimonials.quote: Every piece from Ember feels special. The quality is incredible and knowing it's sustainably made makes it even better.
testimonials.name: Sarah L.

testimonials.quote: My living room was completely transformed with just a few Ember pieces. The curation is impeccable.
testimonials.name: Michael R.

testimonials.quote: Best online shopping experience I've had. Beautiful packaging, fast delivery, and the products exceed expectations.
testimonials.name: Emma K.

cta.heading: Join the Ember community
cta.subheading: Get early access to new collections, maker stories, and 10% off your first order.

contact.heading: Say hello
contact.subheading: Questions about orders, products, or wholesale? We'd love to hear from you.
